summary: Iteration 234: Global Micro-Interaction System - All tests passed. Frontend-only testing completed. All 4 portals (Admin, Customer, Partner, Staff) load correctly with k-page-fade-in transitions. Button press feedback (k-btn-press), drawer transitions (k-backdrop-fade, k-drawer-panel), and table row hover transitions all working correctly. No console errors or CSS conflicts detected.

tests: k-page-fade-in class present on page content
k-page-fade-in class present on both pages
PDF/CSV export buttons present and clickable
Admin layout working for sales_manager role
Admin layout working for finance_manager role
k-btn-press class applied to Button components
Buttons have scale(0.97) active state via CSS
StandardDrawerShell opens with k-backdrop-fade on backdrop
Admin Orders page loads with 100+ table rows
Table rows have transition-colors duration-[120ms] ease-out classes
Navigation between admin pages triggers k-page-fade-in animation
Page content wrapped with keyed div for route changes
No console errors on admin dashboard

micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-btn-press: Applied to Button component base class - provides scale(0.97) on active
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-card-interactive: Applied to Card with interactive prop and MetricCard - provides hover lift
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-page-fade-in: Applied to Outlet wrapper in all 4 layouts - provides fade-slide-up animation
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-tab-fade: Applied to TabsContent - provides fade animation on tab switch
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-backdrop-fade: Applied to StandardDrawerShell backdrop - provides fade-in animation
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-drawer-panel: Applied to StandardDrawerShell panel - provides slide-in-right animation
micro_interaction_classes_verified.k-spinner: Available for Button loading state - provides rotating spinner

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 234 verified the Global Micro-Interaction System implementation. All k- prefixed CSS classes are working correctly: k-btn-press (button press feedback), k-card-interactive (card hover lift), k-page-fade-in (page transitions), k-tab-fade (tab content transitions), k-backdrop-fade and k-drawer-panel (drawer transitions). The interactions.css file is imported in index.js and all 4 layouts (AdminLayout, CustomerPortalLayoutV2, PartnerLayout, StaffLayout) have the k-page-fade-in wrapper around their Outlet components. No CSS conflicts or visual regressions detected.
